title: Cascading delete trigger fails.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Users (id UInt32, name String, email String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE Comments (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, content String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
ALTER TABLE Comments ADD CONSTRAINT fk_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES Users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
INSERT INTO Comments (user_id, content) VALUES (1, 'This is a comment.');
